---
title: Tutorials
---

## [Designing an Offset Amplifier](./designing-an-offset-amplifier/)

![](./designing-an-offset-amplifier/images/generic-offset-amplifier-schematic.png)

This tutorial describes how to design, build, and simulate an offset amplifier.

## [Using the Burst ADC Sampler](./using-burst-sampling/)

This tutorial describes how to add the BurstADCSampler to your robot code for faster sampling and process the output in matlab.
